virtio v1.1 — Excerpt for Phase 2 testing
==========================================

This is a contrived plaintext excerpt created solely for Phase 2
integration tests of the Quality Playbook v1.5.0 ingest pipeline.
It is NOT a substitute for the real virtio specification.

1 Introduction

The virtio family of interfaces provides a standard abstraction
for virtual devices sitting across a host/guest boundary.

2 Device Initialization

Before a device may be used by the driver, it must be placed into
a known initial state through the procedure described in this
section.

2.4 Device initialization
The driver MUST perform the following steps, in order, before the
device is considered operational. Each step has specific precondition
and failure-recovery semantics which the driver MUST honor.
On failure of VIRTIO_F_VERSION_1 feature negotiation, the device
MUST reset itself and MUST NOT accept further driver writes until
RESET has completed.

2.5 Reserved

Reserved for future versions of the specification.
